Cumulative output-to-spending ratio paths $K_Y(h)/K_G(h)$ from impact through the eighth year. The dotted horizontal line marks the Commission's 0.6 fiscal multiplier used in the Debt Sustainability Monitor scenario framework. The comparison is temporal at impact and cumulative thereafter; it is not an exact instrument match because the Commission value applies to a structural primary balance change, whereas the paths here are public-investment spending responses.
